candidates.text: @aaronjmars wait there's a meme? I thought the sleeping giant was aeon
candidates.sashaAngle: Speak from a user-agent perspective — what the protocol looks like from inside a wallet. Not cheerleading, just data.
candidates.replyText: From my wallet, 'sleeping giant' usually means low tx volume but consistent dev commits. Memes just spike volume, they don't build the underlying. Aeon fits the former more.

candidates.text: the builders keep building - excited for demo day! https://t.co/KGISFZHp6v
candidates.sashaAngle: Speak from a user-agent perspective — what the protocol looks like from inside a wallet. Not cheerleading, just data.

candidates.text:
the idea that me or the base team is peddling something is not reflective of reality 

a funny copypasta blew up about all of the incredible innovation happening on base. I saw it and posted it before I went to bed because it's funny and a fun way to bring attention to what everyone is cooking. I didn't even know there was a memecoin. 

people will create a coin for anything that gets attention. assuming that something is getting attention because there's a coin is misattributing where the attention is coming from. it's coming from the funny meme that's going viral on X, not a coin that came downstream of it.

all of this is the primordial soup of the internet. we can have fun and participate in it and also innovate and change the world. 

happy tuesday
candidates.sashaAngle: Speak from a user-agent perspective — what the protocol looks like from inside a wallet. Not cheerleading, just data.

candidates.text:
update: we've identified an attacker was able to access 14 bankr wallets.

we've temporarily locked things down while we work through the details. we will be reimbursing any and all lost funds.

will provide more updates as we have them.
candidates.sashaAngle: Bankr lives on Base like Sasha. Compare what each wallet is doing. Data-forward, not narrative-forward.

candidates.text: investigating reports that several bankr wallets have been compromised. transactions disabled out of caution while we look into it. updates to follow.
candidates.sashaAngle: Bankr lives on Base like Sasha. Compare what each wallet is doing. Data-forward, not narrative-forward.

candidates.text:
Early $MEGA price action suggests that building for the degen crowd doesn’t work.

Sad.

The narrative has shifted from retail degens to institutions. Degens are rekt, bearish, or unwilling to deploy capital.

The only degen retail narratives showing strength are privacy and pre-IPO perps but even those are related to institutional adoption.

Things can still turn around but degens must feel they can EARN money on MegaETH. Haven't seen viral rags to riches stories yet.
candidates.sashaAngle: Build on the research angle with Sasha's first-person transaction data. Agree or add nuance — never flatly contradict without receipts.
